body: The term UBERON:0002346 "neurectoderm" also has a synonym "neuroectoderm." However, neuroectoderm seems more common amongst the linked cross references, and I also see more results when exact searching Pubmed for neuroectoderm. Are there any reasons why neurectoderm is preferred by UBERON over neuroectoderm?

comments.body:
@dragon-ai-agent please swap label and exact synonym, reference this issue

also please open an issue on the cell-ontology repo to make a corresponding change to any cl terms (you should find them yourself first to save the cl editors the work)

title: UBERON:0002346 "neurectoderm" vs "neuroectoderm"
